Video.summary: The pros at partypoker sling chips at nose-bleed stakes with their friends at Playground Poker Club in Montreal. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Francois Safieddine, Ouri Ohayon, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan
Video.title: A Playground For Poker - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: A Playground For Poker - Poker Night In America
A Playground For Poker - Poker Night In America
A Playground For Poker - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: There are some wicked turn outs for the partypoker pros as the poker at Playground Poker Club in Montreal winds down on the first day of our visit. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.
Video.title: Mauvais Coup - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Mauvais Coup - Poker Night In America
Mauvais Coup - Poker Night In America
Mauvais Coup - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: We begin our second day at Playground Poker Club in Montreal, Quebec, and the pros from partypoker face off against some of the best players in North America. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.
Video.title: partypoker Poker Party - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: partypoker Poker Party - Poker Night In America
partypoker Poker Party - Poker Night In America
partypoker Poker Party - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Our second day of filming at Playground Poker Club draws to a close as the pros from partypoker try to draw to a straight. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.
Video.title: Montreal Nights - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Montreal Nights - Poker Night In America
Montreal Nights - Poker Night In America
Montreal Nights - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Poker Night in America Ambassador Matt Glantz joins the partypoker table at Playground Poker Club in Montreal to see how he fares against poker luminaries from Canada and the UK. Featuring Matt Glantz, John Duthie, Mike Dentale, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.
Video.title: Glantzing Blows - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Glantzing Blows - Poker Night In America
Glantzing Blows - Poker Night In America
Glantzing Blows - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: As our third day at Playground Poker Club in Montreal carries on, we showcase some hands we can't believe and some names we can't pronounce. Featuring Manig Loeser, John Duthie, Mike Dentale, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.
Video.title: Mount Royal Flush - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Mount Royal Flush - Poker Night In America
Mount Royal Flush - Poker Night In America
Mount Royal Flush - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: We conclude our final day of filming with the pros at partypoker at the Playground Poker Club in Montreal Featuring Manig Loeser, John Duthie, Jason Koon, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.
Video.title: The City of Saints - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: The City of Saints - Poker Night In America
The City of Saints - Poker Night In America
The City of Saints - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Our first day of high stakes cash kicks off at Choctaw Casino, where Kyle Bowker puts on a poker clinic and runs over this table full of sharks! Featuring Bart Hanson, Kane Kalas, Mike Ross, Kyle Bowker, David Baker, Douglas Lorgeree and Sean Mates.
Video.title: Hanson Family Values - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Hanson Family Values - Poker Night In America
Hanson Family Values - Poker Night In America
Hanson Family Values - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Can anything stop Kyle Bowker? Apparently not the sharks at this high stakes cash game. It's the secone half of day one here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Bart Hanson, Kane Kalas, Mike Ross, Kyle Bowker, David Baker, Douglas Lorgeree, Bobby Greeson and Sean Mates.
Video.title: The Butcher, The Baker, The Over Pair Maker - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: The Butcher, The Baker, The Over Pair Maker - Poker Night In America
The Butcher, The Baker, The Over Pair Maker - Poker Night In America
The Butcher, The Baker, The Over Pair Maker - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: It's the return of everyone's favorite poker degen to the Poker Night table: the Canadian sensation Gavin Smith! Witness his greatness for the start of day two here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Alec Torelli, Esther Taylor, Matt Glantz, Gavin Smith, Chan Pelton, David Baker, and Maxx Coleman
Video.title: The Canadian Sensation - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: The Canadian Sensation - Poker Night In America
The Canadian Sensation - Poker Night In America
The Canadian Sensation - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: If watching infamous poker player Mike Dentale experience excruciating pain is your jam, then this episode is for you. It's part two day two at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Alec Torelli, Esther Taylor, Mike Dentale, Gavin Smith, Chan Pelton, David Baker, and Will Berry
Video.title: Outplayed Like A Mo-Fo - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Outplayed Like A Mo-Fo - Poker Night In America
Outplayed Like A Mo-Fo - Poker Night In America
Outplayed Like A Mo-Fo - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: The Carrot Top of Poker, Jim Carroll, covers the table in comedic props, and Table Captain Gavin Smith is having none of it! This is Day 3 Part 1 at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Jim Carroll, Alec Torelli, Abdyl Konjuhi, Gavin Smith, Matt Russell, Bart Hanson, and Tom Gray
Video.title: Carrot Top of Poker - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Carrot Top of Poker - Poker Night In America
Carrot Top of Poker - Poker Night In America
Carrot Top of Poker - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Alec Torelli shows us why he is one of the best players in the biz, and Gavin Smith gets a hug. It's the end of Day 3 here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Jim Carroll, Alec Torelli, Abdyl Konjuhi, Gavin Smith, Matt Russell, Kyle Bowker, and Denise Good
Video.title: Good Hugger - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Good Hugger - Poker Night In America
Good Hugger - Poker Night In America
Good Hugger - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Kyle Bowker puts on a clinic on proper folds, and Nick Immekus takes on Brandon Cantu in a roller coaster of a hand! This is Day 1 of our cash game at Rivers Casino Pittsburgh! Featuring Shaun Deeb, Todd Brunson, Kyle Bowker, Eli Elezra, Brandon Cantu, Kane Kalas and Nick Immekus.
Video.title: Fold Like A Pro - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Fold Like A Pro - Poker Night In America
Fold Like A Pro - Poker Night In America
Fold Like A Pro - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Sometimes being on a boat is a bad thing. Just ask David Eldridge. Day 1 continues here at Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh! Featuring Shaun Deeb, Todd Brunson, Kyle Bowker, Sam Ganzfried, Kane Kalas and Nick Immekus.
Video.title: Fullest House - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Fullest House - Poker Night In America
Fullest House - Poker Night In America
Fullest House - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Jack Schanbacher goes to great lengths for a possible win with seven deuce, and Joe Stapleton reveals himself to be a cat fancier. This is Day 2 of Poker Night in America at Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh. Featuring Mark Puma, Jack Schanbacher, Kyle Bowker, Todd Brunson, Kane Kalas, Shaun Deeb and Austin Wentling.
Video.title: Manifold Puma - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Manifold Puma - Poker Night In America
Manifold Puma - Poker Night In America
Manifold Puma - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: This episode features a very special appearance by Irene Schanbacher, Jack's grandmother! Day 2 continues here at Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh! Featuring Mark Puma, Jack Schanbacher, Kyle Bowker, Todd Brunson, Kane Kalas, Shaun Deeb, Austin Wentling and Irene Schanbacher.
Video.title: Grandma's Game - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Grandma's Game - Poker Night In America
Grandma's Game - Poker Night In America
Grandma's Game - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: We trade in our typical $25/50 game for $100/200! It's our High Roller table for Day 1 here at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida! Featuring Matt Berkey, Chance Kornuth, Joey DiPascale, Jason Mercier, James Calderaro, Bill Perkins and Mustapha Kanit!
Video.title: Hi Rollerz! - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Hi Rollerz! - Poker Night In America
Hi Rollerz! - Poker Night In America
Hi Rollerz! - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Fortunes are won and lost in this high roller game! This is what poker is all about! Day 1 continues here at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida! Featuring Matt Berkey, Chance Kornuth, Joey DiPascale, Jason Mercier, James Calderaro, Bill Perkins and Mustapha Kanit!
Video.title: Ride the Rollercoaster - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Ride the Rollercoaster - Poker Night In America
Ride the Rollercoaster - Poker Night In America
Ride the Rollercoaster - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: In this episode, more money crosses the table than most of us will ever see in our lifetime. Isn't that... awesome?! Day 1 of our High Roller game concludes here at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Matt Berkey, Chance Kornuth, Joey DiPascale, Jason Mercier, James Calderaro, Bill Perkins and Mustapha Kanit!
Video.title: High Altitude Poker - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: High Altitude Poker - Poker Night In America
High Altitude Poker - Poker Night In America
High Altitude Poker - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Ladies Night returns to Poker Night in America! Samantha Abernathy flexes her bluffing muscles and Jessica Dawley gets crazy lucky on the river! Day 2 begins at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida! Featuring Natasha Mercier, Cate Hall, Lexy Gavin, Samantha Abernathy, Jessica Dawley, Kelly Minkin and Jamie Kerstetter!
Video.title: Themyscira - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Themyscira - Poker Night In America
Themyscira - Poker Night In America
Themyscira - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Sam Abernathy feels so guilty about winning all the time! And who can blame her! Day 2 continues here at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida! Featuring Natasha Mercier, Cate Hall, Lexy Gavin, Samantha Abernathy, Jessica Dawley, Kelly Minkin and Jamie Kerstetter!
Video.title: Guilty Sam - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Guilty Sam - Poker Night In America
Guilty Sam - Poker Night In America
Guilty Sam - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Cate Hall discovers that she and Mike Dentale finally have something in common! Day 2 concludes of our Ladies Night Cash Game here at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida! Featuring Natasha Mercier, Cate Hall, Lexy Gavin, Samantha Abernathy, Jessica Dawley and Jamie Kerstetter!
Video.title: Bluffmeister - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Bluffmeister - Poker Night In America
Bluffmeister - Poker Night In America
Bluffmeister - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: The Poker Night crew returns to Seminole Hard Rock Casino Hotel in Hollywood, Florida.

Video.summary: John Duthie and the regulars from the Dusk Til Dawn game in London take to the beaches of Punta Cana where they are ambushed by Michael Chi Zhang. Featuring John Duthie, Michael Chi Zhang, Justin Sevilla, Timothy Chung, Luke Marsh and Vish Maini.
Video.title: Dusk Til Dawn in Punta Cana - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Dusk Til Dawn in Punta Cana - Poker Night In America
Dusk Til Dawn in Punta Cana - Poker Night In America
Dusk Til Dawn in Punta Cana - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Shaun Deeb joins the Dusk Til Dawn crew for some fish & chips and bad beats. Michael Chi Zhang continues to crush. Featuring John Duthie, Michael Chi Zhang, Justin Sevilla, Timothy Chung, Shawn Deeb and Vish Maini.
Video.title: Dusk Til Dawn in Punta Cana 2 - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Dusk Til Dawn in Punta Cana 2 - Poker Night In America
Dusk Til Dawn in Punta Cana 2 - Poker Night In America
Dusk Til Dawn in Punta Cana 2 - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: King of the Hill Part 1: Heads-Up double shoot-out featuring Phil Hellmuth, Doug Polk, Daniel 'Jungleman' Cates & Frank Kasella. Each has put up $50,000 and only one will leave with $200,000 and the belt!
Video.title: KING OF THE HILL 1 – Part 1/3 - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: KING OF THE HILL 1 – Part 1/3 - Poker Night In America
KING OF THE HILL 1 – Part 1/3 - Poker Night In America
KING OF THE HILL 1 – Part 1/3 - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: King of the Hill Part 2: Heads-Up double shoot-out featuring Phil Hellmuth, Doug Polk, Daniel 'Jungleman' Cates & Frank Kasella. Each has put up $50,000 and only one will leave with $200,000 and the belt!
